title: Historical Closeout Baseline
summary: Baseline older lower-trust closeout references that predate the current package-use and closeout-distillation follow-through. These remain historical audit context, not current external-work state.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Reopen declarative portability so stable lifecycle and runtime truth stops depending on large Python-owned implementations
issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.title: [Planning]: Add navigation/index surfaces so agents can find contract, workflow, schema, and report entrypoints without broad directory scans
issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Make operational-compression measures falsifiable without adding dashboards
issue_classifications.evidence: Historical audit reference retained for context; current provider-agnostic evidence is reconciled separately.

retention.closeout shape: Keep as a compact historical baseline only while follow-up reconciliation needs these accepted-baseline decisions.
retention.trigger: Remove or shrink when source-owned issue refs and current planning state fully replace this manual baseline.
retention.source retention rule: Store only baseline classification judgment and compact refs; issue titles and live states are reconstructable context, not current authority.
retention.distillation path: Promote durable decisions into issues, planning state, contracts, checks, or Memory, then retain only issue ids, classifications, confidence, and follow-up refs.
